messages.content: okay so the process videos are actually working... like really working. patreon jumped to 168 patrons this month, that's $1,110 coming in monthly now
That's fantastic growth! What kind of response are you getting to the process videos specifically?

the timelapse stuff with commentary is hitting different, you know? people are actually engaging with the breakdowns of how i layer textures and... wait no, that's more the music side. the visual art timelapses are what's really pulling numbers. watching paint blend in real time or whatever
Ah, so the visual art process videos are the main driver. Are you thinking of expanding that content format?

definitely, but also... this growth has me thinking about commission rates again. like if my audience is expanding and people are seeing the actual work that goes into each piece, maybe i can justify charging more?
That makes sense - the process videos essentially demonstrate your value proposition. What are you thinking in terms of new rates?

i mean back in october i was at 127 patrons making like $840, now it's almost december and we're at 168... that's what, 41 new people in two months? mostly from the process content. so maybe bump commissions from 400 to... actually no wait, i should probably see where this patreon trajectory goes first
Smart to track the trend a bit longer. Are you seeing consistent growth week to week, or was there a particular video that caused a spike?

it's been pretty steady actually, like 15-20 new patrons each month since i started posting the timelapses. the commentary track where i explain color theory while painting that abstract piece got shared around a lot though
That educational angle seems to be resonating. With that kind of steady growth, you're probably in a good position to test higher commission rates soon.
yeah exactly. if this keeps up through december and january, i think raising commission rates makes total sense. the process videos basically prove i know what i'm doing, right?
Absolutely - they're getting a behind-the-scenes look at your expertise and methodology. That transparency builds a lot of trust and perceived value.

summary: Sam discusses successful Patreon growth to 168 patrons ($1,110/mo) driven by process videos with timelapse and commentary. They're considering raising commission rates but want to track the growth trend a bit longer first.
